name: The Peoples National Bank Of Checotah
description_short: Peoples National Bank of Checotah is a community bank serving Oklahoma since 1911, offering checking, savings, mobile banking, and online bill pay services.
description_long:
Peoples National Bank of Checotah has been operating as a community financial institution since 1911, establishing itself as a long-standing fixture in the Checotah, Oklahoma area. The bank operates from its main location at 300 W Gentry in Checotah and maintains traditional banking hours with after-hours fraud support available to customers. The institution emphasizes local community service and has maintained continuous operations for over a century, suggesting stability and regional commitment.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of standard banking services including deposit accounts, online bill pay, mobile banking applications, debit card services, and loan products. Customers can access their funds through multiple channels: in-person at the branch, via online banking platforms, through mobile applications available on iOS and Android, and through ATM access. The bank provides Card Suite Lite technology allowing customers to control their debit cards directly from mobile devices, and offers both standard and MasterCard debit card options with fraud monitoring services.

Peoples National Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on digital-first banking convenience combined with traditional community banking relationships. The bank proactively implements fraud monitoring services that contact customers via text and email, and provides both standard and secure email communication options for sensitive inquiries. Their transparency about data security—distinguishing between encrypted secure email and unencrypted contact forms—demonstrates customer protection awareness. The long operational history since 1911 positions the bank as an established institution with deep community roots.

As a small community bank, Peoples National Bank serves customers seeking personal banking relationships in the Checotah area. However, the website content provided does not disclose interest rates, fee structures, loan terms, minimum balance requirements, or competitive advantages in terms of product pricing. The bank's service area appears geographically limited to the Checotah community, which may restrict accessibility for customers in surrounding regions. Limited product information on the website may require customers to contact the bank directly for detailed service comparisons. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online bill pay with automated payment processing
Mobile banking application for iOS and Android
Card Suite Lite debit card control via smartphone
Lost or stolen card reporting (business hours: 918-473-2237; after hours: 1-888-263-3370)
Fraud monitoring service with proactive customer contact
Loan products (specific types not detailed on website)
Secure encrypted email communication for sensitive inquiries
Online account management and fund transfers
pros: Established institution with 113+ years of continuous operation since 1911, indicating stability and community trust
Mobile banking app available on both iOS and Android with Card Suite Lite debit card control features
24/7 after-hours fraud reporting line (1-888-263-3370) separate from standard business hours support
Secure encrypted email option available for customers sending sensitive information to the bank
Online bill pay service available to reduce payment processing time and manual check writing
Proactive fraud monitoring service that initiates contact with customers via text and email
Local community bank with direct phone contact (918-473-2237) and accessible physical branch
cons: Website provides minimal product details—no interest rates, fee schedules, or account comparison information disclosed
Geographic service area appears limited to Checotah, Oklahoma area with no evidence of branch expansion or remote account opening
No loan product details, qualification requirements, or rate information available on website for mortgages or personal loans
Limited online services documentation—no information about bill pay processing times, payment limits, or supported payee categories
Website does not display FDIC insurance details, account protection limits, or regulatory compliance certifications
best_for: Checotah, Oklahoma residents seeking convenient local banking with personal relationship access
Small business owners and individuals requiring basic checking, savings, and straightforward debit card services
Customers prioritizing mobile banking convenience and 24/7 fraud support access
Community-minded banking customers valuing long-term institutional stability and local commitment
diagnosis: Peoples National Bank of Checotah is best suited for Oklahoma residents in the Checotah area seeking stable, community-focused banking with modern digital conveniences. The primary caveat is the lack of detailed product information, pricing, and service terms on their website—interested customers must contact the bank directly to compare rates and evaluate competitive positioning against larger regional or national banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
